beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Search the common house for a tree ent
beats.summary: Brynjar checks the common house at sunrise — no tree ents, two locals at breakfast, fire still warm.

beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Walk to the Common House
beats.summary: Brynjar enters the common house at sunrise — two women at breakfast, fire still warm, Mara's wayhouse chimney smoking up the lane.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Search for and meet Bynjar
beats.summary: Usnea steps inside to find and introduce themselves to Brynjar by the common house fire.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Ask Brynjar plainly what his stake is — what brings him here, what he knows, what he expects from the meeting.
beats.summary: Brynjar names his stake: a deliberate marker left beyond the new pass, and a question about whether it connects to the water crisis.

beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Try the two women at the table — ask casually whether either of them knows who else uses the east bank stock trail this
beats.summary: Two women at breakfast place the east bank traveler as a Venn family shepherd — and note a dark-coated figure who walked the river road south-to-north two days ago, before dawn, without stopping.

beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Greet Usnea and share what you've just learned — the Venn shepherd, the dark-coated figure — before you both go to Mara.
beats.summary: Brynjar briefs Usnea on the Venn shepherd and the dark-coated figure before heading to Mara's wayhouse.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Tell him the meeting is about to open — invite him to stay and hear the evidence, and let his question surface naturally
beats.summary: Usnea invites Brynjar to stay and hear the evidence, then steps outside to give Mara the opening signal.
